items.example: Public transport is much better than driving in the city centre.
Solar energy is not as expensive as it was ten years ago.
Reducing waste is the most important thing we can do.
Recycling is a lot cheaper than producing new materials.
The new park is as big as three football fields.
This solution is slightly better than the previous one.
Electric cars are far more efficient than petrol cars.
Walking is the least harmful form of transport.
